summary: Dynamic Invoice Category System testing completed. All 8 features tested successfully. Backend: 12/12 tests pass (rate limiting caused 3 setup errors on repeated runs). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - Settings business_type selector, Quote form categories, Invoice form categories, and adding predefined items all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Category service properly filters by business_type using MongoDB $or queries
Settings page correctly loads business types from /api/business-types endpoint
Quote and Invoice forms both use getDynamicCategoriesWithItems() API
Category items include price, unit, and description for easy selection
Rate limiting on login (5/minute) is working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests pass when run without rate limit issues)

seed_data_creation: Categories seeded via POST /api/categories/seed?force=true - 9 categories and 50 items in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic category system fully tested. Rate limiting is strict (5 logins/minute) - wait between test runs. Categories are filtered by user's business_type field in settings. 'general' users see all categories, specialized users (electrician, plumber, etc.) see only relevant categories.

GET /api/business-types returns availabl.details: Returns 7 types (general, electrician, plumber, mason, painter, carpenter, it_installer) with French labels

GET /api/categories/with-items returns c.details: Returns 9 categories with items for 'general' user. Each category includes id, name, business_types, icon, and items array

GET /api/categories/{id}/items returns i.details: Returns items with id, name, category_id, description, default_price, unit

Settings page includes business_type sel.details: Dropdown shows all 7 business types with French labels. Saves correctly via PUT /api/settings

Quote form shows dynamic categories from.details: Category dropdown shows all 9 categories. Article dropdown populates when category selected

Invoice form shows dynamic categories fr.details: Same as quote form - category and article dropdowns work correctly

Selecting a category populates the artic.details: Tested with Électricité (6 items) and Plomberie (6 items) - both populate correctly with price/unit

Adding a predefined item to quote works.details: Selected 'Installation interrupteur' from Électricité - added to quote with correct description, unit, price (55€), and VAT (20%)

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features working as expected.
